reasons: Price trend remains constructive: 5-day momentum is -2.7% and 20-day momentum is 14.7%.
Trend quality is supported by 60% positive sessions over the last 10 trading days and the price sitting 7.5% relative to its 20-day average.
Risk profile shows daily volatility around 3.3%, downside volatility near 2.5%, and a recent max drawdown of 6.0%.
Volume confirmation is -31.8% versus the trailing baseline, which helps separate steady breakouts from thin momentum.
Relative strength is -1.6% versus SPY over 5 days and -2.1% versus the sector ETF.
News signal is bullish with score 0.75, confidence 0.63, and 0.4 weighted articles across 1 sources.
GPT-5 article classification and company-news provider coverage rated the news flow bullish at 0.75, after adjusting for relevance, recency, source quality, and story concentration.
Evidence quality: 3 articles across 1 sources, 0.4 effective weighted articles, average relevance 0.61, average source quality 0.75, confidence 0.63.
Technical weights were calibrated on 2303 historical symbol-weeks against 5-day excess return (IC -0.01).
Overall model score is 0.064 with medium confidence.

news_evidence.title: Nebius’ $775 Million Debt Deal Changes Everything About Its AI Growth Story
news_evidence.llm_reason: Article focuses on Nebius' $775M debt deal to expand AI infrastructure and references hyperscalers including Meta in broad context. Provides sector/competitive color but no Meta-specific developments or near-term financial implications; low likelihood of moving META over next 1–10 trading days.

news_evidence.title: Coreweave Down 35% . This Analyst Reiterated His $250 Target Even After ‘Meta Compute’ Was Announced.
news_evidence.llm_reason: Covers CoreWeave's sharp drop tied to fears around Meta's newly announced 'Meta Compute'. While the article centers on CoreWeave and analyst views, it reflects immediate market reaction to a recent Meta product/announcement and therefore has the highest near-term relevance for META sentiment and competitive positioning.
